programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: For sea lovers Elizabeth and Ryan, any day spent on the water is a wonderful day; after experiencing a health scare, they realize it is time to pursue their passions full-time.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Daren and Naana are searching for a turn-key home with an ocean view; they need a location to open their dream roadside ice cream shop.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Lane and Tristan love finding homes and renovating them to their taste. This time, as they search for their forever home by the ocean, Lane wants a turn-key property so they can focus on settling in. Tristan agrees but secretly dreams of customizing another home. With the help of their best friend and realtor Susan, will they be able to find a home that makes them both happy?

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Misty and Derrick have always felt a deep connection to the ocean; after facing health challenges, they realized life is too short not to live where their hearts belong; now they are on the hunt for a rural home that offers a seaside lifestyle while keeping them close to nature; will they find the perfect balance of peace, ocean, and adventure?

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: With retirement around the corner, Svetlana and Harrison are ready to begin their next chapter by the water; Harrison loves the crisp coastal weather, while Svetlana has always dreamed of ocean views; a small town in Nova Scotia offers the perfect balance, and now they're searching for a home to host family and enjoy their golden years together.

programs.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programs.desc: Katie and Matt thought they had found their dream home, but Katie realized one thing was missing, the ocean; having grown up by the water, she is determined to give her children the same coastal childhood; now they are leaving their perfect inland home behind, ready to trade some luxury for life by the sea; will they find the perfect oceanfront home for their family?
